title: Custom Poker Textures
description: Playing cards and poker chips! Play Poker with your friends!
body:
This texturepack adds poker chips and 52 playing/poker cards. The chips range is from 1 to 1000. And the playing cards from 2 to Ace. This texturepack needs Sodium to run! Disclamer: The textures are not mine. I merely combined them, ported them to Fabrik and updated them to the current version.
The textures of the playing cards are from FreeZeeZon. Credits: His [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/playingcardsnm), his [Website](https://freezeezon.netlify.app/).
The textures of the game chips are from [WandererEdges](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-cards).
The invisble itemframes are from [jannik6879](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/invisible-itemframe). ### How to use Rename the following Items to get the Textures.
Stack of Chips Rename the item iron_nugget:
  • small-chips
  • medium-chips
  • big-chips
Chips Rename the item gold_nugget
  • Chip-1
  • Chip-5
  • Chip-10
  • Chip-25
  • Chip-50
  • Chip-100
  • Chip-500
  • Chip-1000
Cards Rename the item paper
  • A-Diamond
  • K-Diamond
  • Q--Diamond
  • J-Diamond
  • 10-Diamond
  • 9-Diamond
  • 8-Diamond
  • 7-Diamond
  • 6-Diamond
  • 5-Diamond
  • 4-Diamond
  • 3-Diamond
  • 2-Diamond

  • A-Star
  • K-Star
  • Q-Star
  • J-Star
  • 10-Star
  • 9-Star
  • 8-Star
  • 7-Star
  • 6-Star
  • 5-Star
  • 4-Star
  • 3-Star
  • 2-Star

  • A-Heart
  • K-Heart
  • Q-Heart
  • J-Heart
  • 10-Heart

  • A-Gold
  • K-Gold
  • Q-Gold
  • J-Gold
  • 10-Gold
  • 9-Gold
  • 8-Gold
  • 7-Gold
  • 6-Gold
  • 5-Gold
  • 4-Gold
  • 3-Gold

Commands You can find the 2 Commands on my Github
The first command gives you 3 Shulker boxes with all items.
The second command gives you all items.
